_comment_demo: Primary demo/playable map for MVP. Create once: File -> New Level -> Empty Open World -> Save As /Game/HomeWorld/Maps/DemoMap. No duplicate from another level.
_comment_volume: PCG volume center and half-extents in cm. Set use_landscape_bounds false and volume_center_* / volume_extent_* to match your landscape; see docs/PCG_QUICK_SETUP.md.
_comment_exclusion_zones: Compound bounds (center + half-extents in cm). Trees will not spawn inside these zones.
_comment_resource_nodes: Day 7: positions in cm for place_resource_nodes.py. Spawns BP_HarvestableTree at each.
